title: corysanthes callosa
intro: Corysanthes callosa, also known as the callosum, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Corysanthes callosa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, and to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Corysanthes callosa is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
